title: AG-UI endpoint and event mapper in agent runtime
goal: Expose the existing LangGraph agent through a safe AG-UI-compatible SSE endpoint without breaking the current chat endpoints.
non_goals: Do not change Django tool execution semantics.
Do not expose raw tool payloads in AG-UI events.
acceptance: The stream emits RUN_STARTED and RUN_FINISHED or RUN_ERROR.
Text chunks map to TEXT_MESSAGE_* events with stable messageId.
Tool calls map to TOOL_CALL_* events without leaking secrets.
ui_command maps to allow-listed state/custom event.
